Pricing
🎉 Create a Board

Elevate Workplace Appreciation

Empower your teams with a premium recognition platform. Choose from specialized formats designed to celebrate life milestones, reinforce company values, and spark peer-to-peer gratitude.

Key Milestones

Honor professional journeys and life events

Recognize employee birthdays, promotions, career retirements, and long-term service milestones. Set up reminders ahead of time so no milestone goes unnoticed.

📅

Milestone Reminders

Set up email reminders ahead of key dates so boards are always ready before the moment arrives.

🎁

Curated Gifts & Books

Add optional physical gifts or print a high-quality hardcover keepsake book with all co-signed messages.

👥

Multi-Department Signing

Easily coordinate large-scale boards that span multiple teams, geographical divisions, or external partners.

✨ Key Milestones Board
🎂Birthday

Happy Birthday, Sarah!

"Wishing you the happiest of birthdays! Thank you for bringing so much energy and passion to the product team every single day. Have an amazing celebration!"

Marcus VanceDirector of Product
🏆Milestone

Happy 5-Year Work Anniversary!

"Five years of absolute dedication, building code bases, and leading our team to success. We are incredibly lucky to have you, David. Here is to five more!"

Elena RostovaVP of Engineering
🎖Promotion

Congrats on the Promotion!

"So well-deserved, Clara! Your leadership during the Q1 launch was outstanding. Excited to see you excel in your new Senior Manager role!"

James PatelHead of Operations
Connection & Values

Bring company values to life in everyday work

Embed corporate principles into everyday employee behaviors. Create values-driven appreciation campaigns that showcase real teamwork in action, aligned to your core mission.

🏷

Bespoke Value Badges

Assign custom tags and stickers matching your company core values (e.g. Integrity, Customer First).

📈

Engagement Insights

Track which company values are demonstrating high adoption using real-time employee sentiment analytics.

📣

Public Appreciation Walls

Display value-driven recognition cards on office displays or corporate intranets to keep positive wins visible.

✨ Connection & Values Board
💡Core Value

Innovation in Action

"Kudos to Priya for thinking outside the box! Her refactoring of the backend API reduced latency by 45%. This perfectly embodies our core value of Tech Innovation."

Simon PeterLead Architect
🤝Collaboration

Customer Obsession

"A massive thank you to Ken for staying late on Friday to resolve the server issue for our enterprise customer. Truly outstanding commitment to customer trust!"

Rachel GreenCustomer Success
🚀Ownership

Ownership & Drive

"Thomas took full ownership of the marketing campaign launch under a tight deadline and delivered stellar results. Proud to have you on the squad!"

Chloe SimmonsCMO
Peer Kudos

Spontaneous appreciation across all levels

Give everyone a voice. Foster a peer-to-peer appreciation culture that breaks down corporate silos and increases team engagement by celebrating everyday collaborative victories.

🔓

Zero-Friction Access

Teammates can sign instantly via email or Google login — no complex credentials or account setup required.

💬

Notion Integration

Keep recognition visible inside your team workspace where everyone already collaborates daily.

🎉

Interactive Confetti & Media

Allow co-signers to attach GIFs, customized background styles, photos, and animated greetings to highlight card uniqueness.

✨ Peer Kudos Board
🙌Spontaneous Kudos

Thanks for the Help!

"A quick shout-out to Leo for jumping in to help me debug my frontend code yesterday. I would have been stuck for hours without your support. You rock!"

Maya LinFrontend Dev
🍕Team Shoutout

Friday Deployment Savior

"Huge thanks to the devops team for ensuring a smooth release on Friday evening! Celebrating with pizza — appreciate you all!"

Arjun MehtaRelease Manager
⚡Peer Thanks

Quick Turnaround

"Kudos to Lisa for polishing the client deck within an hour. The client was absolutely blown away by our responsiveness and detailed figures!"

Robert ChenAccount Director

Ready to recognize your team?

Start a board in 2 minutes. No subscription required, invite unlimited co-signers, and customize layouts effortlessly.
